title: lippia briquetii
intro: Lippia briquetii, also known as "French lavender" or "Spanish lavender," is a flowering plant species within the verbena family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Lippia briquetii include its potential to alleviate stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and reduce symptoms of menopause. Lippia briquetii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
